title: Home Based Parenting Education * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Child Care & Parenting > Home Based Parenting Education * Hispanic/Latino Community 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community At Risk Families Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Domestic Violence Issues Ex-Offenders Hispanic/Latino Community TANF Recipients Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LATINO NETWORK CRECIENDO JUNTOS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community Education Workers (promotores de educación) conduct home visits for low-income families, families of color, and English language learners. In addition to home visits, promotores facilitate school-based, culturally responsive parent-child workshops. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Low-income Latinos with children ages 0-6 Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 283-6881 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO NETWORK SOÑANDO JUNTOS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home visits with a focus on school preparation and healthy development. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 0-6 Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 283-6881 . Get Directions Visit Website More Details MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES ABC LISTOS PARA APRENDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting trainings, educational home visits, parenting issues support groups, parenting materials, referrals, case management, and developmental screening. Offers parents support with guidance on how to deal with a child's tantrums, questions about a child's developmental stages, and alternative types of discipline. 7820 NE Holman Street Suite B5 Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Spanish speaking parents with children ages 0-5 or who are pregnant Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, some evening appointments available Email (503) 258-4200 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO NETWORK CRECIENDO JUNTOS MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES LISTOS PARA APRENDER
